name: Aldrees Petroleum and Transport Services Company
summary: Aldrees Petroleum and Transport Services Company engages in the wholesale and retail of fuel, gasoline, lubricant, and oil in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. The company operates through Petroleum Services and Transport Services segments. It operates approximately 544 fuel stations. The company offers various services related to additives, car wash, tire servicing, alignment, accessories, food, mosque, ATMs, car rental, etc. at its fuel stations. It also provides transportation and logistics services through a fleet of trucks and trailers. The company was founded in 1957 and is headquartered in Riyadh, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
